name: Pineapple Butterscotch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the syrup.
2. Combine 1 1/2 cups of crushed pineapple with butterscotch chips in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, mix pound cake and pudding mixes according to package directions. Use reserved syrup for all or part of the liquid as specified.
4. Stir in the remaining crushed pineapple.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9 inch pan.
6. Top with the pineapple-chip mixture.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 to 65 minutes.
Preheat oven to 325°F
Grease and flour 13x9 inch pan
